mapper.insert: insert into am_login_failure_limit (username, failure_count, lock_level, first_failed_at, last_failed_at, cleanup_after, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, 1, 0, #{now}, #{now}, #{cleanupAfter}, #{_audit.now}, #{_audit.now}) on conflict (username) do nothing
mapper.select: select username, failure_count, lock_level, first_failed_at, last_failed_at, locked_until, cleanup_after, created_at, updated_at from am_login_failure_limit where username = #{username} for update
mapper.update: update am_login_failure_limit set failure_count = #{limit.failureCount}, lock_level = #{limit.lockLevel}, first_failed_at = #{limit.firstFailedAt}, last_failed_at = #{limit.lastFailedAt}, locked_until = #{limit.lockedUntil}, cleanup_after = #{limit.cleanupAfter}, updated_at = #{_audit.now} where username = #{limit.username}
